problem id: 6f7a9048
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10111110 -> 10111111
  01001000 -> 10100100
  00011000 -> 10001100
  01100010 -> 00010001
  01111111 -> 11001111
  11111110 -> 10011111
  10001111 -> 10110111
  00101110 -> 11110111
  01101011 -> 10000101
  01000110 -> 01000011

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 00101000
